title: stelis pauciflora
intro: Stelis pauciflora, also known as the Few-flowered Stelis, is a species of orchid native to tropical and subtropical regions. The medicinal properties of Stelis pauciflora include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations. Stelis pauciflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be approached with caution due to limited research on its safety and efficacy.
